description: Pure wrapper container for dashboard composition. Owns sizing (variant, col/row span) and exposes a named container query scope (`sherpa-container`) so descendant viz components (charts, grids) can adapt their internal layout via container queries.

attributes.name: data-menu-open
attributes.description: Reflected while a descendant menu is open

events.name: container-increase-cols
events.description: Bubbled from injected resize menu items

events.name: container-decrease-cols
events.description: Bubbled from injected resize menu items

events.name: container-increase-rows
events.description: Bubbled from injected resize menu items

events.name: container-decrease-rows
events.description: Bubbled from injected resize menu items
